properties.title: Török Gábor a Forsthoffer–Magyar csörtéről: Az első komoly tiszás nyilvános konfliktust láthattuk
properties.summary: A politikai elemző a rendszerváltás óta nem emlékszik olyan esetre, hogy egy házelnök tartalmi probléma miatt az aktuális miniszterelnöktől vonta volna meg a szót.

properties.title: Ebből így nehezen lesz erős GDP-adat: május végéig egyszer sem tudott komolyabb pluszt produkálni a magyar export
properties.summary: Viszont a külkereskedelmi egyenlegben 502 millió eurós többlet lett májusban, ami kicsit megakasztotta az idei év romló tendenciáját.

properties.title: Visszavette tapasztalt mérnökeit a Ford, mert az MI nem vált be a minőség-ellenőrzésben
properties.summary: A cég egyik alelnöke szerint hiányzott az automatizált rendszerekből az a tudás és szakértelem, amellyel a tapasztalt mérnökök rendelkeznek.

properties.title: Visszavette a kirúgott mérnökeit a Ford, mert nem vált be a mesterséges intelligencia
properties.summary: Van, amiben az ember nem, vagy csak nehezen pótolható. A Ford ezt most a saját bőrén tapasztalta meg, vissza is kellett venniük sok korábbi mérnöküket.

properties.title: Karácsony Gergely: Botrány, hogy az úszómedencéket töltik fel közpénzből támogatott vízzel
properties.summary: Némi ivóvíz járhatna mindenkinek ingyen, cserébe az úszómedencék után számoljanak fel külön díjat – javasolta a főpolgármester.

properties.title: Robbantásos merénylettel támadtak egy ukrán oligarchára Monacóban
properties.summary: Két felnőtt súlyosan, egy gyermek könnyebben sérült meg abban a monacói robbantásban, amellyel a Kijev által szankciós listára helyezett Vadim Jermolajevet vették célba.

properties.title: Figyelmeztet a Shell: évtizedes növekedés után itt a fordulat
properties.summary: A Shell előrejelzése szerint a globális cseppfolyósítottföldgáz-kínálat (LNG) az idén stagnálhat, ami több mint egy évtizedes töretlen növekedés után jelentene komoly fordulatot. A megtorpanás hátterében a közel-keleti konfliktus áll, amely jelentősen visszavetette a kínálatot, írja a Bloomberg.

properties.title: Akár 80 százalékkal is többet érhet ez a részvény - És most rendkívül jó áron megveheted!
properties.summary: A nyári időszakban sem unatkozhatnak a befektetők: az iráni események, az inflációs várakozások és a mesterséges intelligencia körüli fejlemények egyaránt komoly hatással vannak a piaci hangulatra. Ebben a változékony környezetben azonban továbbra is lehet olyan részvényeket találni, amelyekben bőven van fantázia.

properties.title: Magyar Péter Panyi Miklósnak: Ön egy hazug, embertelen tróger!
properties.summary:
Panyi Miklós (Fidesz) arról számolt be a Tisztelt Ház előtt, hogy számos minisztériumi dolgozót megfélemlítettek és kirúgtak az átadás-átvétel során.

The post Magyar Péter Panyi Miklósnak: Ön egy hazug, embertelen tróger! first appeared on 24.hu.

properties.title: Két órára leállt az utalás és a pénzváltás a Revolutnál
properties.summary:
A Revolut három funkció esetében számolt be részleges leállásról.

The post Két órára leállt az utalás és a pénzváltás a Revolutnál first appeared on 24.hu.

properties.title: BNR: Programul SAFE poate aduce un plus de până la 2,6 puncte procentuale economiei României. Când se vor vedea efectele
properties.summary: Programul european SAFE (Security Action for Europe) ar putea avea un impact cumulat asupra creșterii economice a României cuprins între 0,7 și 2,6 puncte procentuale în perioada 2026-2030, potrivit unei analize a Băncii Naționale a României (BNR). Totuși, banca centrală avertizează că efectele economice depind de o serie de factori încă incerți, precum ritmul de absorbție a fondurilor, capacitatea industriei locale de a participa la proiecte și implementarea fără întârzieri a investițiilor.

properties.title: Cine este Vadim Ermolaev, oligarhul ucrainean rănit în explozia de la Monaco
properties.summary: Trei persoane au fost rănite, dintre care două foarte grav, în urma detonării, luni seara, a unui dispozitiv exploziv la Monaco. Potrivit unei surse apropiate anchetei, citată de BFMTV, cele trei victime - un cuplu cu vârste cuprinse între 50 şi 60 de ani şi un adolescent de 13 ani - sunt de naţionalitate ucraineană. Două dintre victime sunt Vadim Ermolaev şi partenera sa. Acest oligarh ucrainean, născut în 1968, a ajuns în trecut pe locul 23 în clasamentul celor mai bogate persoane din Ucraina, întocmit de revista Forbes.

properties.title: Valul de căldură care a ucis sute de oameni în vestul Europei ajunge în est. „Urmează cele mai grele două zile”
properties.summary: Unele zone din Europa Centrală, de Est și de Sud au fost cuprinse luni de o căldură sufocantă, pe măsură ce „cupola de foc” responsabilă de temperaturile record înregistrate săptămâna trecută s-a deplasat spre est, aducând condiții periculoase într-o nouă zonă a continentului. Conform modelelor Centrului European pentru Prognoze Meteorologice pe Termen Mediu, se preconizează că marți temperatura la Budapesta va depăși 40 de grade Celsius, arată The Guardian.

properties.title: Un oligarh ucrainean a fost rănit în explozia din Monaco. Autorul atacului cu colet-capcană a fugit
properties.summary: Explozia provocată de un colet-capcană a rănit un oligarh ucrainean şi alte două persoane în Monaco, au declarat autorităţile, într-un act fără precedent care a zguduit principatul cunoscut pentru securitatea sa extremă. O sursă apropiată anchetei, care a dorit să rămână anonimă, a declarat pentru AFP că unul dintre răniţi este oligarhul ucrainean Vadim Ermolaev, transmite France24.

properties.title: Nămolul din Oltenia, un „miracol” uitat. Cum arată astăzi stațiunea balneară care concura cu Băile Felix și Techirghiol, în anii '70
properties.summary: O stațiune balneară celebră în anii '70, care concura cu Băile Felix și Techirghiol, a ajuns acum o ruină. Și-ar putea recăpăta faima, spun autoritățile locale, dacă Guvernul le-ar aloca fondurile necesare. Nămolul de la Ionele, din Oltenia, era cunoscut în toată țara pentru proprietățile valoroase. Acum, stațiunea mai este vizitată doar de localnicii din zonă.

properties.title: Aerul condiționat poate dăuna sănătății dacă diferența de temperatură dintre interior și exterior e prea mare. Recomandarea medicilor
properties.summary: Aerul condiţionat ne poate ajuta când este caniculă, însă trebuie utilizat cu prudenţă, iar diferenţa dintre temperatura din interior şi cea de afară nu ar trebui să depăşească 10 grade Celsius, avertizează directorul medical al Spitalului de Pneumoftiziologie din Sibiu, pneumologul Lavinia Danciu.

properties.title: Foametea provocată de regimul sovietic în 1946-1947 va fi recunoscută în Republica Moldova drept crimă împotriva umanității / 200.000 de oameni au murit atunci
properties.summary: Foametea provocată de regimul totalitar sovietic în anii 1946-1947 pe teritoriul actualei Republici Moldova va fi recunoscută oficial drept crimă împotriva umanității, iar negarea, justificarea sau minimalizarea publică a acestei tragedii ar putea fi pedepsite cu închisoare de până la 5 ani. Un proiect de lege în acest sens a fost  înregistrat în Parlament de …

properties.title: Codul roșu de temperaturi extreme a fost extins de ANM. Alerte de vijelii puternice intră în vigoare în câteva ore
properties.summary: Aproape toată România, cu excepția județelor Tulcea și Constanța, se află până mâine, la ora 10.00, sub alertă cod roșu de caniculă. De la ora 12.00, intră în vigoare alerte cod portocaliu și galben de furtuni puternice și grindină, ce vizează peste jumătate de țară. Noul cod roșu de temperaturi extreme a fost emis de …

properties.title: Familia Safir a cumpărat ferme de 16,5 milioane EUR nord-estul României: „Mulți angajați riscau să rămână fără loc de muncă, într-o regiune unde alternativele sunt limitate”
properties.summary: Holding Familia Safir, afacere agricolă de familie din regiunea Moldovei, este cea care a cumpărat, la prețul de 16,5 milioane de euro, o serie de ferme de la Grup Șerban Holding, care se confruntă cu procedura insolvenței, iar acum cumpărătorul menționează că a preluat și aproape 40 de angajați care „riscau să rămână fără un …

properties.title: Rețea suspectată de fraude de tip „investment scam” destructurată în România, Republica Moldova și Ucraina / Prejudiciu estimat la aproximativ 3,6 milioane de lei
properties.summary:
Autoritățile din România, Republica Moldova și Ucraina au destructurat o rețea suspectată de fraude prin investiții de tip „investment scam”, în urma unei acțiuni comune desfășurate pe 25 iunie 2026. Au fost 25 de percheziții, 8 în România și 17 în Ucraina. Acțiunile au vizat inclusiv centre de tip call-center utilizate în activitatea grupării. Operațiunea […]

© G4Media.ro.

properties.title: Rusko útočilo na Kyjev či Záporoží, Ukrajina zasáhla rafinerie okupantů
properties.summary: Rusko v noci na neděli podniklo další údery na ukrajinská města. Nejméně dva mrtvé a šestnáct zraněných včetně dětí hlásí Záporoží, po dvou zraněných uvádí Kyjev a Černihiv. Ukrajina pokračovala v náletech na ruské rafinerie, podle telegramových účtů i ukrajinského prezidenta Volodymyra Zelenského zasáhla podniky v Krasnodarském kraji a v Jaroslavské oblasti. Cílem útoku se stala také tepelná elektrárna a železniční most na okupovaném Krymu.

properties.title: Čtvrtý blok Dukovan je po dvou měsících v plném výkonu. V červenci čeká odstávku třetí blok
properties.summary: Čtvrtý blok jaderné elektrárny Dukovany je po plánované odstávce znovu na plném výkonu. Odstavený byl od 17. dubna, elektřinu začal do sítě znovu dodávat minulý týden v pátek. Celkový výkon obou turbosoustrojí čtvrtého bloku je aktuálně 499 megawattů, sdělila v úterý mluvčí společnosti ČEZ Jana Štefánková.

properties.title: Výbuch bomby v Monaku těžce zranil dva lidi, strůjce útoku je na útěku
properties.summary: Při pondělním výbuchu bomby v Monaku utrpěl těžká zranění ukrajinský oligarcha Vadim Jermolajev a další dva lidé. Po útočníkovi policie pátrá.

properties.title: Působivé tácy, misky a servírovací doplňky pro letní pohoštění
properties.summary: Léto se nese ve znamení setkávání. Grilování s přáteli, večeře na terase, pomalé snídaně na balkoně nebo odpolední posezení u tapas a sklenky vína. Právě v těchto chvílích dostává větší prostor i způsob servírování. Dobře zvolený talíř nebo podnos totiž dokáže z obyčejného občerstvení vytvořit něco, co hosty zaujme ještě dřív, než ochutnají první sousto.

properties.title: Po eksplozji w Monako policja poszukuje tego mężczyzny. Opublikowano zdjęcie
properties.summary: Po eksplozji, do której doszło w centrum Monako, domniemany sprawca nadal jest na wolności. Monakijskie i francuskie służby prowadzą poszukiwania. Opublikowano zdjęcie z monitoringu. Według mediów wskutek wybuchu ranny został między innymi ukraiński biznesmen.

properties.title: „Infobalt“ prezidentu išrinktas „Ondato“ vadovas L. Kanapienis
properties.summary: Skaitmeninių technologijų asociacija „Infobalt“ dvejų metų kadencijai išrinko naują valdybą ir jos pirmininką – prezidentą. Juo tapo tarptautinės skaitmeninės tapatybės ir atitikties technologijų bendrovės „Ondato“ įkūrėjas ir vadovas Liudas Kanapienis.

properties.title: Valsts noturības stiprināšana: Moldovā vēlas ieviest obligāto militāro pamatapmācību
properties.summary: Moldovas valdība vēlas, lai valsts pilsoņi izietu obligāto militārās pamatapmācības kursu, bet vidusskolās ieviestu patriotisko audzināšanu. To paredz likumprojekts, ko ir sagatavojusi un parlamentā iesniegusi Aizsardzības ministrija.

properties.title: Latviešu «slam dunk» lielmeistars Dārgais gatavs savu karjeru noslēgt sacensībās Grīziņkalnā
properties.summary: Jau otrdien Grīziņkalnā norisināsies vienas no lielākajām sacensībām bumbas triekšanā grozā no augšas – "Kings of Air", kas būs pēdējās sacensības latviešu titulētākajam "slam dunk" meistaram Kristapam Dārgajam.

properties.title: Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia
properties.summary:
A Riga City Court has sentenced an electrician to five years and six months in prison for spying on behalf of Russia’s military intelligence agency (GRU). The court also imposed one year and eight months of probation supervision following his release, without confiscation of property, the LETA news agency has learned. According to the prosecution, […]

The post Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Rosļikovs, wanted by authorities, to run in Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections
properties.summary:
The leaders of the For Stability! party’s candidate lists for Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections will be Svetlana Čulkova, Pāvels Kuzmins, Natālija Marčenko-Jodko, Ludmila Rjazanova, and Igors Orlovs, according to the LETA news agency. Čulkova, who leads the dissolved For Stability! parliamentary group, will head the party’s list in the Riga constituency. Running second on the […]

The post Rosļikovs, wanted by authorities, to run in Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns
properties.summary:
The recent cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), in which a hacker managed to breach the company’s IT systems and gain control over data, demonstrates that Latvia’s strategic infrastructure remains relatively vulnerable to such attacks, Minister for Smart Administration and Regional Development Edgars Tavars said in an interview with TV3 on Friday. The minister called […]

The post Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia
properties.summary:
Some eastern parts of Latvia may see light rain on Friday, while light northerly winds will prevail across most of the country, according to the Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre. Daytime temperatures will rise to 22–27°C, while areas along the Gulf of Riga coast will remain a few degrees cooler. Over the weekend and […]

The post Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings
properties.summary:
Most members of Riga City Council’s leadership saw their public approval ratings decline during the first half of this year, according to the latest survey conducted by research company SKDS on behalf of the Riga City Council. Only three politicians improved their popularity in May compared with November last year. The sharpest decline was recorded […]

The post Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia
properties.summary:
Another oil depot has caught fire in Russia’s Krasnodar region following overnight Ukrainian drone strikes, according to Russian and Ukrainian media reports. The Ukrainian Telegram channel Exilenova+ reported that three fuel storage tanks caught fire at the oil depot in the village of Poltavskaya after the attack. According to the Telegram channel Astra, the Poltavskaya […]

The post Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Zelensky: If attacks continue, Moscow will burn
properties.summary:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has said that the intensive drone attacks on Russian territory are a response to the strike on a historic monastery in Kyiv, and that Moscow will also burn if the attacks continue, Reuters reports. A large number of drones were sent to Moscow on the night of the 18th of June, […]

The post Zelensky: If attacks continue, Moscow will burn appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: US-Iran deal: 14 points and support for reconstruction
properties.summary:
The White House has announced that the agreement to extend the ceasefire between the US and Iran has been signed and entered into force, but many unclear issues remain, writes the BBC. US President Donald Trump signed the agreement while attending a meeting of the G7 countries in France. The 14-point agreement, called a memorandum […]

The post US-Iran deal: 14 points and support for reconstruction appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Latvenergo issues 300 million euros in Green Bonds
properties.summary:
Latvia’s state-owned energy company Latvenergo issued 300 million euros worth of seven-year unsecured European Green Bonds on the 16th of June, according to a statement submitted to the Nasdaq Riga stock exchange. The bonds carry a fixed annual interest rate of 4.162% and will mature on the 25th of June 2033. The issuance was carried […]

The post Latvenergo issues 300 million euros in Green Bonds appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Gallery: Tallinn Linnahall grand tapestry renovation begins
properties.summary: Conservation work began Monday on artist Enn Põldroos' 41-year-old tapestry "Lives of People" at Tallinn Linnahall. The work is expected to be completed by the end of July.

properties.title: First Tallinn trolleybus lines to reopen in July
properties.summary: Starting July 1, new battery-powered trolleybuses will begin serving passengers in Tallinn on routes 84 and 85. Beginning in August, they will also be introduced on routes 81, 83 and 72.

properties.title: No miracle shortcuts to human longevity
properties.summary: A healthy lifestyle helps reduce the risk of premature death and increases the number of years lived in good health. However, no short-term miracle cure or strict diet can guarantee living to the age of 100, Tallinn University demographers Michel Poulain and Anne Herm emphasize in a new research paper.

properties.title: Tallinn's Hirvepark to recieve new lighting solution
properties.summary: The footpaths and bastion in Tallinn's Hirvepark will be lit up by a new lighting solution and residents can submit feedback on the plan until July 2.

properties.title: Tallinn City Government replacing trash cans across the capital
properties.summary: Tallinn has started replacing public trash cans across the capital, but critics say the placement of the waste receptacles still needs improvement.

properties.title: Marathon Narva council meeting latest standoff as power struggle continues
properties.summary: A nearly 12-hour Narva City Council meeting Friday ended in three no-confidence motions after repeated procedural clashes, long recesses and a stalled agenda fight.

properties.title: Ukraine recovery conference spotlights defense sector, postwar plans
properties.summary: As the war continues, a conference in Gdańsk brought together defense firms, policymakers and investors to plan Ukraine's postwar recovery and long-term security.

properties.title: Estonian court fines plaintiffs over false AI-generated claims
properties.summary: In what officials say is a first for Estonia, a Tallinn court fined plaintiffs over false academic references generated by artificial intelligence (AI) in a legal filing.

properties.title: FOTO ⟩ «Hoiduda ujumast!» Tallinna veekogudes levib taas sinivetikas
properties.summary: Tallinna ja Harjumaa mitmes supluskohas on viimastel päevadel täheldatud sinivetikaid ehk tsüanobaktereid. Teateid on tulnud muu hulgas Laulasmaa piirkonnast, Viimsist Haabneeme rannast ning teistest Tallinna-lähedastest randadest. Terviseamet soovitab suplejatel enne vette minekut hoolikalt hinnata vee seisundit ning kahtluse korral ujumisest loobuda.

properties.title: INTERVJUU ⟩ Lembe Ruben: inimeseks olemist ei õpetata kusagil
properties.summary: Graafik ja loovuskoolitaja Lembe Ruben avas hiljuti Tartu kunstimajas näituse «Punkti ja joone vahel», mida võib vaadata 19. juulini.

properties.title: OTSEPILT ⟩ VII Eestimaa võimlemispidu «Maaelu Võlu» toob kokku tuhanded võimlejad
properties.summary: Eelolev nädalavahetus toob Tallinnas asuvale Kalevi Keskstaadionile kokku tuhanded võimlejad, sest VII Eestimaa võimlemispidu «Maaelu Võlu» pakub võimast vaatemängu, tuues kokku nii looduse, liikumise kui ka emotsioonid ühele staadionile.

properties.title: FOTO ⟩ «Kas tõesti nemad?» Viru trammipeatuses märgati väidetavalt presidenti koos kaaslasega
properties.summary: Tallinnas Viru keskuse juures trammipeatuses jäi mööduja kaamerasilma ebatavaline vaatepilt, mis on sotsiaalmeedias juba omajagu elevust ja küsimusi tekitanud. Kas need võisid olla endine riigipea Toomas Hendrik Ilves ja tema USAst pärit kaaslane dr Alicia Skarimbas, kes ootasid trammi ning kelle näoilmed samuti tähelepanu äratasid?

properties.title: Kambja vald muudkui kasvab
properties.summary: Ajal, mil Eesti rahvastik väheneb, jätkab üks linnalähedane vald kasvamist: 25. juuni seisuga elab Tartu külje all Kambja vallas 14 701 inimest. Poole aastaga on elanike arv seal suurenenud ligi 170 inimese võrra.

properties.title: Kinnisvaraülevaade: kuldne ring pakub investorile üüriäris ootamatut eelist
properties.summary: Tallinna ümbruskonna linnade ja valdade üüriturud pole ülemäära elavad, kuid nõudluse täpse sihtimisega võib investor pealinnaga võrreldes omale tasku pista väiksema vaevaga suurema tootluse.
